items.summary: ExploreResponseAssembler uses viz.Edge as an intermediate data carrier, creating an api→viz dependency for a non-visualization concern

evidence: buildExplorationEdges() returns List<Edge> only to be consumed by edgeToMap() in the same class — the Edge object is never used for actual rendering
viz.RadialPlot is the rendering engine; Edge and RelationEdgeType are data records that conceptually belong with the model layer, not the viz layer
detail.suggestion: Move Edge and RelationEdgeType to the model package (e.g. model.graph or model.exploration), so that api and viz can both import them without creating an api→viz coupling. The viz package should depend on model types, not the other way round. This is a straightforward file-move with import updates.

evidence: model/package-info.java lists '{@link pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model.exploration.Edge}' as an example pure DTO in the model/exploration sub-package
No Edge.java exists under model/exploration/; the actual Edge record is at viz/Edge.java
ExploreResponseAssembler imports viz.Edge, confirming the real location
detail.suggestion: Remove the stale @link reference from model/package-info.java; if Edge semantically belongs in model/exploration (it represents a domain graph edge, not a visualization concern), move it there and update the viz package accordingly

action_steps.detail: Sibling reference: viz/RadialPlot.java (exists). Create package-info.java in the same directory: viz/package-info.java. Content: /** Package containing visualization utilities, specifically RadialPlot for building radial graph data. */ package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.viz; Matches convention of all 8 sibling packages.

items.summary: viz package mixes a visualization utility (RadialPlot) with plain domain model types (Edge, RelationEdgeType) that the api layer must import

evidence: ExploreResponseAssembler (api package) imports viz.Edge and viz.RelationEdgeType to assemble exploration responses — these are plain domain graph types, not visualization-specific
Edge and RelationEdgeType are simple records/enums with no rendering logic; their placement in viz blurs ownership of the domain model
The expected dependency flow (api → model ← exploration) is broken by this api → viz cross-dependency for non-visualization data
detail.suggestion: Move Edge and RelationEdgeType into model/exploration/ (they are exploration domain graph types) and keep RadialPlot in viz; update ExploreResponseAssembler imports accordingly — this restores the clean api→model dependency without dragging in the visualization package

items.summary: Exploration domain split across exploration/ (logic) and model/exploration/ (data types) creates a dual-lookup navigation tax

evidence: ExplorationHandlers.java imports from both model/exploration/ (ComparisonResult, ExplorationResult, FetchExamplesResult, ExplorationOptions, SingleSeedExplorationOptions) and exploration/ (ExplorationService) — the API handler must know to look in two packages
exploration/SingleSeedExplorer.java imports CoreCollocate, DiscoveredNoun, ExplorationResult, SingleSeedExplorationOptions from model/exploration/ — logic and its own data types are split
A developer searching for CollocateProfile or ExplorationOptions will first look in exploration/ and not find them
The split is consistent (all exploration DTOs are in model/exploration/, all services/explorers are in exploration/) but requires knowing this implicit convention
detail.suggestion: Consolidate the exploration domain into a single package. Staged plan: (1) Move all files from model/exploration/ into exploration/ — this makes exploration/ the single location for all exploration concepts. (2) Update imports codebase-wide: `find src -name '*.java' | xargs sed -i 's/import pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model.exploration./import pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.exploration./g'`. (3) Delete the now-empty model/exploration/ directory. (4) Verify with `mvn compile` and `mvn test`. If the model/ vs logic separation is considered a hard architectural principle, an alternative is to rename model/exploration/ to exploration/dto/ or exploration/model/ to make the relationship explicit rather than requiring knowledge of the parent model/ convention.

clusters.name: stream-clarity-fixes
clusters.description: Stream deduplication clarity and collocate aggregation extraction

clusters.name: auto/security
clusters.description: Fix 2 security issues

clusters.name: package-placement
clusters.description: Move RadialPlot out of api/ package and fix model package asymmetry

clusters.name: code-cleanup
clusters.description: Quick cleanup fixes: remove redundant imports, redundant pom dep, fix stale comment, naming inconsistencies

clusters.name: dedup-fixes
clusters.description: Eliminate code duplication and fix predicate delegation in CollocateQueryHelper and ComparisonResult

clusters.name: test-improvements
clusters.description: Improve test coverage: add BlackLab integration test harness and strengthen multi-seed assertions

clusters.name: type-safety
clusters.description: Replace raw string render mode with enum to prevent bypass

clusters.name: parameter-inversion
clusters.description: Fix ExplorationService.fetchExamples parameter order mismatch across interface, implementation, and callers

clusters.name: dependency-health
clusters.description: Fix pom.xml: resolve Jackson version conflict, change jspecify to provided scope, add SLF4J-Log4j bridge

clusters.name: circular-dependency
clusters.description: Break config<->query circular dependency by moving RelationType, RelationPatternUtils, RelationUtils to config package

clusters.name: api-surface-coherence
clusters.description: Align ExplorationService parameter names, fix stale Javadoc, normalise error envelope, unify response shapes across explore/compare endpoints

clusters.name: wrapper-proliferation
clusters.description: Delete or flatten single-field options wrappers, dead model methods, and private Map-wrapping records in model/exploration and api layers

clusters.name: package-organization
clusters.description: Relocate domain helpers out of utils/ and collapse the under-populated viz/ single-class package

clusters.name: concordance-abstraction
clusters.description: Unify concordance example fetching path across ExplorationHandlers and ConcordanceHandlers; align query strategy in exploration classes

clusters.name: stale-deferred
clusters.description: Remove stale HTTP-server migration TODO and resolve PatternSubstitutionTest naming against non-existent class

clusters.name: radialplot_placement
clusters.description: Move RadialPlot out of api/ into viz/ package; relocate Edge and RelationEdgeType from model/exploration to a presentation layer

clusters.name: stale_javadoc
clusters.description: Fix stale Javadoc @link references to deleted classes, remove upward @link violations (config → api), and fix abbreviation inconsistencies (colloc, dep, sent)

clusters.name: ai_generated_debt
clusters.description: Consolidate 3 duplicate static ObjectMapper instances, remove nosy debug body dump, fix duplicate try/catch, remove passthrough wrappers, eliminate dead code

clusters.name: error_handling
clusters.description: Fix InvalidQuery wrapped as IOException causing HTTP 500 instead of 400; remove dead catch blocks; make precondition violations throw instead of silently returning empty; add missing migration guard for old cql_pattern config key; unify GrammarConfigLoader exception contracts

clusters.name: concordance_abstraction
clusters.description: Eliminate double buildFullPattern call in ConcordanceHandlers non-fallback branch; make handleSemanticFieldExamples use buildExploreResponseEnvelope like its siblings

clusters.name: api_service_symmetry
clusters.description: Make ExplorationService.exploreByPattern consistent with multi-seed/comparison methods by using ExplorationOptions; give buildExploreResponseEnvelope typed parameters instead of two indistinguishable Map<String,Object>

clusters.name: nullable_contracts
clusters.description: Add @Nullable annotations to all documented-null parameters and return values across RelationPatternUtils, CollocateQueryHelper, BlackLabSnippetParser, and VisualizationHandlers

clusters.name: design_coherence_response
clusters.description: Introduce typed response records instead of raw Map<String,Object> in internal building methods; break SemanticFieldExplorer dual role; normalize ComparisonResult construction pattern

clusters.name: test_coverage_gaps
clusters.description: Add integration tests for real HTTP-to-JSON flows and re-enable or replace disabled BlackLab live-index tests with in-memory equivalents

clusters.name: security_surface
clusters.description: Add startup validation for CORS wildcard override and document BCQL access control decisions

clusters.name: package_coherence
clusters.description: Move Edge/RelationEdgeType from viz/ to model/exploration/; consolidate exploration domain into one package; fix stale model/package-info.java reference; add viz/package-info.java; fix ExploreResponseAssembler api->viz dependency

clusters.name: visibility_contracts
clusters.description: Fix visibility drift in exploration/ package: make MultiSeedExplorer and CollocateProfileComparator package-private to match SingleSeedExplorer convention; make ExplorationResult constructor package-private or replace with static of() factory

clusters.name: nullable_enforcement
clusters.description: Fix @Nullable/@NonNull annotation gaps: add null check before BlackLabIndex dereference in production methods; remove redundant defensive null check in deriveDeprel() since pattern is @NonNull

clusters.name: api_response_types
clusters.description: Introduce typed Jackson-serializable response records to replace Map<String,Object>; add relation_type discriminator to sketch relation map; align /semantic-field/examples and /concordance/examples response shapes; normalise seeds echo contract in sibling endpoints

clusters.name: service_abstraction
clusters.description: Remove SemanticFieldExplorer pass-through delegation methods; split QueryExecutor into two narrower interfaces (CollocateQueryPort/SketchQueryPort); extend ExplorationService or add ConcordanceService to cover ConcordanceHandlers and CorpusQueryHandlers so they no longer hold QueryExecutor directly

clusters.name: doc_accuracy
clusters.description: Fix stale/wrong documentation: update CLAUDE.md code structure section to match actual file layout; remove mislabelled 'testing seam' from SingleSeedExplorer.explore Javadoc; add @throws IllegalArgumentException to GrammarConfigLoader.fromReader Javadoc; shorten STATE_ constant comments to remove name-restating

clusters.name: naming_quality
clusters.description: Fix naming issues: rename EnvelopeExtras to RequestEchoFields/ResponseMetaFields or a clearer name; rename CommonExploreParams to SharedExploreParams or BaseExploreParams; rename loop variable 'adj' to 'collocate' in buildCollocateProfileList

clusters.name: response_assembly
clusters.description: Fix response assembly inconsistencies: add SketchResponseAssembler to handle inline DTO assembly in SketchHandlers; replace EnvelopeExtras with explicit builder or per-handler overloads to clarify envelope shape responsibility

clusters.name: low_level_cleanup
clusters.description: Fix low-level code quality issues: centralise POST body parsing in HttpApiUtils.readJsonBody; extract 15-line lambda in executeSurfacePattern to named private method; remove unreachable unquoted fallback in resolvePosGroupFromPrefix; separate collectHits dual concern into two methods; replace misleading null-checking ternary with textValue(); remove redundant relObj.has('dual') guard

clusters.name: input_validation
clusters.description: Add input bounds-checking to VisualizationHandlers: validate center, width, height, and per-item label fields against MAX_PARAM_LENGTH before passing to RadialPlot, consistent with all other handlers

clusters.name: test_quality
clusters.description: Fix test robustness: use OS-assigned ephemeral ports (pass 0) instead of fixed ports 18080-18082 in WordSketchApiServerTest; consolidate lemma extraction regex in StubQueryExecutor.extractLemmaFromPattern to remove coupling to CQL pattern format
